children.label: B

children.label: A
children.text: consistent with a comprehensive approach to preventing school violence; and

children.label: B
children.text: individualized to the needs of each school at which those improvements are to be made;
include an assurance that the applicant shall maintain and report such data, records, and information (programmatic and financial) as the COPS Director or the BJA Director may reasonably require;

children.label: A
children.text: the programs to be funded by the grant meet all the requirements of this subchapter;

children.label: B
children.text: all the information contained in the application is correct; and

children.label: C
children.text: the applicant will comply with all provisions of this subchapter and all other applicable Federal laws.

children.heading: Guidelines
children.label: b Guidelines
children.text: Not later than 90 days after , the COPS Director and the BJA Director shall each promulgate guidelines to implement this section (including the information that must be included and the requirements that the States, units of local government, and Indian tribes must meet) in submitting the applications required under this section.March 23, 2018
